title: ShimotsukiMon
description: A modpack made for Shimotsuki's Cobblemon server!
body:
# Shimotsuki's Cobblemon Modpack
This modpack is specifically designed for Shimotsuki's Cobblemon Minecraft server, bringing together an optimized and immersive Cobblemon experience. It includes a collection of mods to enhance gameplay, improve quality of life, and provide exciting features for Pokémon fans.

## Features
**Cobblemon Core Experience:** Play with Cobblemon, a mod that introduces Pokémon into Minecraft, allowing you to catch, train, and battle Pokémon in a fully integrated Minecraft world.

**Quality-of-Life Enhancements:** A selection of mods that improve the overall gameplay experience, hunger bar improvements, roughly enough items stuff, and FPS improvers.

**Rideable Pokémon:** Experience the joy of riding Pokémon to travel across vast terrains, adding a new level of mobility and immersion to your adventure.
Server Optimization: Designed to run seamlessly with Shimotsuki's server configurations, ensuring stable multiplayer gameplay and compatibility.

## How It Enhances the User Experience
This modpack provides a polished Cobblemon experience by focusing on key aspects of gameplay improvement. The quality-of-life mods streamline interactions, reduce tedious tasks, and improve user interfaces, while the rideable Pokémon feature adds depth to exploration and adventure. By combining these elements, the modpack delivers a balanced and enjoyable experience tailored to the Shimotsuki server community.
